title: CreateWorldUI
description: Modern Minecraft world creation, backported to 1.7.10
body:
# CreateWorldUI

A complete redesign of the **Minecraft 1.7.10 + 1.12.2** world creation screen, inspired by the clean and intuitive UI of modern Minecraft.  
CreateWorldUI brings a smoother, more organized, and more user‑friendly experience to a classic version of the game.

If you feel the vanilla 1.7.10 world creation menu is outdated or cluttered, this mod gives it a fresh, modern upgrade.

---

## ✨ Features

### **Modern Tabbed Layout**
World creation options are reorganized into three clear tabs:
- **Game** – game mode, difficulty, cheats  
- **World** – seed, world type, structure generation  
- **More** – additional settings and future extensions  

This layout mirrors modern Minecraft and makes navigation faster and more intuitive.

---

### **Built‑in GameRule Editor**
Edit gamerules directly in the UI:
- Toggle buttons for boolean rules  
- Text fields for numeric or string rules  
- Reset and Save buttons for quick adjustments  

No more typing `/gamerule` commands manually.

---

### **UI Improvements**
- Cleaner layout for world name, seed, and buttons  
- Custom textures for tabs and gradients  
- **Backported modern difficulty selection**, including difficulty lock  
- Overall smoother and more polished user experience

---

## 📱 Want the best experience?
For the smoothest installation and updates, **use the Modrinth App**.  
Downloads through the Modrinth App also help support the project and future development.   
A companion [resource pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/createworlduicompatibility) is also provided, enhancing CreateWorldUI and ClearMyBackground with a 1.20.5+‑inspired visual style.   

## Wiki

More detailed infomations, see [here](https://github.com/song682/CreateWorldUI/wiki).   

## Notification

With the release of v4.0.0 CreateWorldUI has achieved its core goals. The mod is now maintained rather than actively developed: you can expect fixes for serious bugs and regressions, but no regular feature additions. Community contributions and pull requests are welcome. 

---

## 📦 Dependency
**1.7.10**:    
- **[UniMixins](https://modrinth.com/mod/unimixins)** (required)

**1.12.2**:     
- **[MixinBooter](https://modrinth.com/mod/mixinbooter)** or **[MixinBootstrap](https://modrinth.com/mod/mixinbootstrap)** (required)
